title: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work
text:
Built a ~9M param LLM from scratch to understand how they actually work. Vanilla transformer, 60K synthetic conversations, ~130 lines of PyTorch. Trains in 5 min on a free Colab T4. The fish thinks the meaning of life is food.

Fork it and swap the personality for your own character.
summary: 作者构建了一个约900万参数的小型语言模型，使用基础Transformer架构和6万条合成对话数据，仅用130行PyTorch代码实现，可在免费Colab T4上5分钟完成训练，模型以"鱼认为生命的意义是食物"为趣味示例，鼓励用户克隆并自定义角色性格。

title: Google releases Gemma 4 open models
summary: 谷歌发布了Gemma 4开源模型，提供高性能AI工具供开发者使用。

title: Gemma 4 on iPhone
summary: 谷歌推出Gemma 4模型可在iPhone上运行，展示移动端AI应用新进展。

title: Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI
summary: 作者历经八年渴望，利用AI技术三个月内构建了SyntaQLite项目，分享其开发历程与成果。

title: Show HN: Gemma Gem – AI model embedded in a browser – no API keys, no cloud
text:
Gemma Gem is a Chrome extension that loads Google's Gemma 4 (2B) through WebGPU in an offscreen document and gives it tools to interact with any webpage: read content, take screenshots, click elements, type text, scroll, and run JavaScript.

You get a small chat overlay on every page. Ask it about the page and it (usually) figures out which tools to call. It has a thinking mode that shows chain-of-thought reasoning as it works.

It's a 2B model in a browser. It works for simple page questions and running JavaScript, but multi-step tool chains are unreliable and it sometimes ignores its tools entirely. The agent loop has zero external dependencies and can be extracted as a standalone library if anyone wants to experiment with it.
summary: Gemma Gem是一款Chrome扩展，将谷歌Gemma 4（2B）AI模型嵌入浏览器，无需API密钥或云端，可直接与网页交互（如读取内容、点击元素等），并内置小型聊天浮窗，支持链式思考推理，但多步骤操作可能不稳定。

title: Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code
summary: 该帖子介绍了如何使用LM Studio的新命令行工具在本地运行Google的Gemma 4模型，并提到了与Claude Code的整合功能。

title: Show HN: Modo – I built an open-source alternative to Kiro, Cursor, and Windsurf
summary: 这是一个开源项目Modo，旨在替代Kiro、Cursor和Windsurf等工具，提供类似功能。

title: Recall – local multimodal semantic search for your files
summary: Recall 是一个本地多模态语义搜索工具，可帮助用户快速查找文件内容，支持多种文件类型和语义理解。
